title: THE EARLY LEARNING CENTER - 211info
text: THE EARLY LEARNING CENTER THE EARLY LEARNING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supporting families with children to be successful in school by providing, and connecting to programs, and services that advance early literacy, promote health, and development, and foster strong resilient relationships. Also offers parent-child interaction play-groups known as Peggy's Primary Connection. 1310 S 8th Street Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Varies. (Peggy's Primary Connection 0-5 years old) Hours: Varies by service (541) 942-3532 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 942-3532 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Children's Play Groups Family Support Centers/Outreach Parent Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY CARE SPECIALIST LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - KIDS IN TRANSITION TO SCHOOL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
